span.p:
progress.record()
INSERT INTO user_skill_scores
(userId, skill, score, submissionId)

span.p:
Fetch last 10 scores
Per skill, DESC by created_at
(Sliding Window, N=10)

- mean (average)
- count
- deviation (sample std dev)
